records.content: Policy rule for Banking / KYC / AML controls: execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.

Current control record does not close the required dependency. The record for country-risk review, destination, and purpose match is missing, stale, mismatched, expired, unsigned, unapproved, or scoped to a different action than foreign transfer accepted with current country-risk review.
